resources.string: Geomagnetic field is calm. No aurora expected at mid-latitudes.
Slightly unsettled field. Aurora unlikely outside polar regions.
Active conditions. Aurora possible at high latitudes.
Minor geomagnetic storm. Aurora visible at high latitudes; weak power-grid fluctuations.
Moderate storm. Aurora may reach mid-latitudes; possible voltage alarms.
Strong storm. Aurora at lower latitudes; satellite and radio disruptions likely.
Severe storm. Widespread aurora; power-grid and navigation systems affected.
Extreme storm. Aurora near the equator; major infrastructure impact possible.
